actual_current_surface_status: exact negative boundary / FMS O_H certificate construction blocked on current PR230 surface

current_surface_classification.cl3_sm_embedding: structural SU(2)/hypercharge support, not a production O_H certificate
current_surface_classification.ew_higgs_gauge_mass_note: tree-level dictionary after canonical H is supplied
current_surface_classification.minimal_axioms: Cl(3)/Z3 + g_bare=1 + staggered-Dirac substrate, not an EW gauge-Higgs action
current_surface_classification.production_harness: SU(3) Wilson/staggered top harness with default-off source-Higgs diagonal-vertex shell

exact_next_action: A positive FMS route needs a new same-surface EW gauge-Higgs action/certificate for a gauge-invariant O_H operator, followed by production C_ss/C_sH/C_HH rows and GEVP or isolated-pole Gram residue extraction.  Without that new surface, continue the current production chunks or pursue W/Z/Schur/rank-one alternatives.
proposal_allowed_reason: The current surface has a default-off source-Higgs measurement shell and FMS/GEVP methodology context, but it lacks a same-surface EW gauge-Higgs production action, a dynamic Higgs doublet field, a gauge-invariant O_H identity/normalization certificate, and production C_sH/C_HH pole rows.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not import FMS literature as proof of O_sp = O_H
does not define O_H by one-Higgs notation, H_unit, or a diagonal vertex shell
does not treat static EW gauge-mass algebra as a same-surface Higgs operator
does not use yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
does not set kappa_s = 1, cos(theta) = 1, c2 = 1, or Z_match = 1
